There are no actor UUIDs to populate scope_actors with, and no entity UUIDs (commitments, customers, resources) to populate scope_entities with. The signal mentions 'refund flow' but there is no matching commitment or resource in context to link to. Without any valid UUIDs to scope a Model to, inserting a claim would violate the rule that empty scope on both fields is almost always wrong and UUIDs must not be invented. Therefore the correct action is to emit zero claim_ops — the system cannot properly scope any Model from this signal given the empty context."}
